meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your freelance projects. Learn how to debug with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'can't finish' cycle, treat your codebase as a modular set of constraints rather than a monolith. By integrating Claude Code for iterative CLI-based debugging and Antigravity for structural analysis, you offload cognitive overhead, maintain project velocity, and ensure your final delivery meets production-grade standards every single time.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance careers is paved with 'almost finished' projects. You’re trapped in a loop: the features are 90% there, but the last 10%—the obscure bugs, the edge-case state management, the deployment friction—feels like wading through quicksand. Your client's patience is thinning, and your profit margins are evaporating with every hour spent staring at a stack trace.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started orchestrating it? By leveraging AI-native workflows, you shift from being a manual debugger to an architectural director. It’s time to stop letting bugs dictate your deadlines and start using specialized AI tooling to reclaim your professional momentum.

steps.title: Map the Failure Surface
steps.description: Before fixing, isolate the exact failure point. Use AI to scan your logs and identify the root cause of the feature stall.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these logs and stack trace. Identify the specific file and function blocking the completion of this feature. Output a JSON breakdown of dependencies affected.

steps.title: Structural Refactoring
steps.description: Use AI to simplify complex logic blocks that cause technical debt, making them easier to finalize.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this function to reduce cyclomatic complexity. Ensure the logic is modular so it can be tested in isolation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/logic.ts --prompt 'Simplify this function for better testability'

steps.title: Automated Test Generation
steps.description: Don't guess if it works. Generate unit tests for the edge cases that are holding up your final deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of Jest tests covering all edge cases for this module, specifically targeting the failure points identified in step 1.

steps.title: Dependency Audit
steps.description: Often, the 'can't finish' problem is a dependency mismatch. Use AI to verify your package integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my package.json and current environment. Identify any version conflicts preventing successful build completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm audit' && claude read --path package.json

steps.title: Final Integration Validation
steps.description: Perform a final end-to-end simulation to ensure the feature is production-ready for client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Simulate a user flow for this feature. Check for any state leakage or race conditions that would crash the app in production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm run build && npm run start'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'scratchpad.md' file where AI writes its internal reasoning; it prevents the model from losing context over long sessions.
Use Claude Code to create a 'cleanup' script that runs after every debugging session to prune unused imports and dead code.
For complex bugs, ask the AI to explain the issue like a senior architect; the shift in tone often reveals assumptions you missed.
Force the AI to generate a 'repro.md' file that documents exactly how to trigger the bug, which you can then send to clients to justify extended timelines.
Never accept the first fix; prompt the AI to 'provide two alternative implementation strategies with pros/cons' to ensure you pick the most maintainable path.
content.next_steps: Once the project is stable, implement a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to ensure that future features don't re-introduce these specific bugs.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance success. Master the tools that turn hours of frustration into minutes of execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
